abilities.name: Ephemeral (3)
abilities.text: After this model is summoned, it is dealt 3 damage which may not be reduced.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Lost in the Clouds
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may kill a friendly Seishin within 3" to reduce that damage by 2.

actions.name: Sharp Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: From the Heavens
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (fortitude) abilities.

triggers.name: Spirit Rend
triggers.text: The target must have an Adversary token. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Hateful Spirits
triggers.text: Summon a Seishin in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Shadow and Mist
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target any number of friendly Seishin within range.
actions.effects: This model declares the Walk action. After resolving the Walk, place any models targeted within 3" of this model.
